name: codex-consults-claude
description: Let Codex consult Claude Code as an advisor for plan checks, sanity checks, architecture, and review through Claude Code's MCP server.

interface.shortDescription: Ask Claude Code for plans, sanity checks, and review.
interface.longDescription: Codex Consults Claude connects Codex to Claude Code through the local Claude MCP server. Use it when Codex needs a more expensive second opinion for plan confirmation, confusion resolution, architecture, risky changes, or final review while Codex remains the primary implementation worker.
interface.defaultPrompt: Ask Claude to sanity-check this plan before coding.
